e1_sentence: It has been narrated by Abu Huraira that the Messenger of Allah (may peace be  upon him) said:   One of the Prophets made a holy war
e2_sentence: He said to his followers: One who has  married a woman and wants to consummate his marriage but has not yet done  so; another who has built a house but has not yet erected its roof; and  another who has bought goats and pregnant she-camels and is waiting for their  offspring - will not accompany me

e1_sentence: He said to his followers: One who has  married a woman and wants to consummate his marriage but has not yet done  so; another who has built a house but has not yet erected its roof; and  another who has bought goats and pregnant she-camels and is waiting for their  offspring - will not accompany me
e2_sentence: So he marched on and approached a village  at or about the time of the Asr prayers
